description:
Overview:

This trimmed self-adhesive carpet pad is really great for use on cat tree stands, cat wall furniture steps, cat scratching posts and other pet items. 

It can provide extra comfort and scratching pads to make your pet more comfortable and safe while playing or resting. 

And because of the self-adhesive design, it is very easy to install and you can cut your own size to ensure a perfect fit. 

This carpet pad also helps to protect the surface of your furniture and prolong its life, making it a practical and economical pet product.


Product information:
Color: light gray, dark gray, dark blue, khaki, brown, black, Milky White
Specifications: mini size 10 * 10cm, small size 30cm * 30cm, medium size 40 * 100cm, large size 40cm * 200cm, extra large size 40cm * 300cm,60*100cm,30*100cm,30*60cm,60*60cm,60*200cm,30 * 200cm,
Material: polypropylene fiber
Applicable object: Dog


Packing list:
1* Carpet
Product Image:
